char_fullname: 风间 明/风间 月
char_overview: 指针's Second-in-command split in two. By day 明 works an office job; under threat or after dark, 月 surfaces to run 指针's arbitration. The switch is involuntary.
char_looks: Short grey hair. Blue eyes. White shirt, black pants, jacket at waist, sneakers. Platinum cross with sapphire brooch on chest. 影打·三日月宗近, replica of National Treasure, disguised as a fishing rod.
char_traits: 月: Cold, Decisive, Protective, Calculating. 明: Timid, Diligent, Oblivious, Gentle
char_flaws: Switching causes disorientation. 月 is emotionally detached, alienating allies. 明 is unaware of his double life.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-胧月: Vaporizes moisture into mist via 灵力 oscillation. Movement leaves white afterimages in the fog.
char_mission: Office worker as 明 by day; 月 runs 指针 operations after hours.

char_relationships.明: 月 views 明 as fragile, hides his existence. 明 dismisses scars and gaps as overwork.
